text: Hi, my name is Tori and I'd like to welcome you to Building Muscle 101's interval training
program on the elliptical machine.
Let's get started.
First we will begin with a 3-5 minute warm up at a low resistance level prior to beginning
the workout which consists of a series of 4 intervals.
An interval is basically alternating high intensity and lower intensity periods within
a single workout.
Following the warm up at a resistance of 2, begin interval 1 by increasing the resistance
to 5.
After 1 minute, increase the resistance to 10 to work at a higher intensity.
That completes interval 1.
To begin interval 2, decrease the intensity back to a resistance level of 1.
This is a 3-5 minute warm up.
To begin interval 3, increase the resistance to a resistance level of 5.
Maintain the resistance level of 5 for 2 minutes.
After working at level 5 for 2 minutes, increase the resistance to level 10 and maintain this
intensity for 3 minutes.
For a brief recovery period after 3 minutes has passed, lower the resistance to 7 and
maintain this for 3 minutes.
Before lowering it down to 6.
For another brief recovery period.
Interval 4 begins with the resistance being at level 10 for 3 minutes.
For your brief recovery period, lower the resistance down to 7 and maintain this intensity
for 5 minutes.
Once you've completed interval 4, you're ready for a cool down.
Lower the resistance level to 2 and maintain this for a 3-5 minute cool down.
Well that's it for our warm up.
Thanks for watching.
Bye.
Thanks for watching our liftable interval training program.
Hope you've enjoyed your workout.
Have a great day.
Have a great day.
